steps.title: Identify the core limitations
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that heliographs were effective “only during the daytime” and their range “depended on factors such as the opacity of the air and line of sight.” The word “Therefore” signals that replacement technology directly addressed these environmental constraints.

steps.title: Match the answer to those constraints
steps.content: Choice B—”not so constrained by environmental circumstances”—directly overcomes the daytime-only limitation and the dependence on opacity and line of sight. The other three address irrelevant concerns and fail to solve the core environmental constraints. That matches choice B — B is correct.
